key.name: zoom-pixels
key.description: Number of extra pixels added to the hovered icon's size. The zoom scale is computed at runtime as (iconSize + zoomPixels) / iconSize, so the visual growth is always the same absolute pixel amount regardless of the icon size setting. Neighbour icons are reduced by 0.10 per ring.

key.name: neighbour-step
key.description: Scale reduction applied to each ring of icons around the hovered icon. 0.0 means all visible icons zoom equally (no wave), 0.50 means only the immediate neighbours receive any zoom. Intermediate values create a wider or narrower wave effect.

key.name: sharp-scaling
key.description: When enabled, icons use nearest-neighbour (point) scaling instead of the default bilinear filter. This produces pixel-sharp edges but may look jagged at non-integer zoom levels. Disable for smooth (blended) scaling.

key.name: anim-duration
key.description: Duration of the magnification ease animation in milliseconds.

key.name: restore-delay
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before icons return to normal scale after the pointer leaves the dock area.
